title: Tempting Silky American Epoisses Dumplings
description: Rich and silky American dish featuring epoisses, agemono-deep-fry, and shojin-friendly ingredients, served in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour and water to form a smooth dough.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten each into a disk shape.
Place a tablespoon of epoisses cheese in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the cheese to form a half moon shape and press the edges to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Deep fry the dumplings until they are golden brown.
Drain the dumplings on paper towels and brush with sesame oil.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the dumplings in a bamboo steamer with chopped scallions on top.
